deals.deal: Any Pizza, Any Crust, Any Toppings for $9.99
deals.desc: Order any Domino's pizza with any crust (including Parmesan Stuffed Crust) and up to 7 toppings for $9.99 online or in app — XL and Specialty pizzas excluded.
Get any large Pizza Hut pizza with up to three toppings for $10 via the app or online.
Choose three pieces of chicken, two sides, or a chicken sandwich from the $5 Faves Menu — no app required at participating locations.
Build your own combo — sandwich, fries, and drink — for $5 every day via the app or in-restaurant.
Download the McDonald's app to access rotating daily coupons including BOGO Breakfast Sandwiches and $6 Combo Meal deals.
Use promo code FL599 in the Subway app to get a Footlong for $5.99 — availability varies by zip code, so check your local store.
Wendy's Biggie Deals offer full combos at $4, $6, and $8 price points every day — no app required.
Sonic's new $7 Big Deal Meal bundles a burger or sandwich with fries and a drink at one everyday price — available at the drive-in or via app.
Sonic's refreshed $1.99 Menu features multiple food and drink items available all day every day.

deals.deal: $6 Value Menu — All Day, All Night
deals.desc: IHOP's $6 Value Menu is available around the clock at participating locations, making it a strong pick for late-night diners.

deals.deal: The Clock's Off Menu — New All-Day Dishes
deals.desc: Denny's new The Clock's Off Menu brings fresh breakfast, lunch, and dinner options available 24 hours at participating locations nationwide.

deals.deal: Value Menu Bean and Cheese Burritos Under $2
deals.desc: Del Taco's Value Menu regularly features Bean and Cheese Burritos for under $2 — a late-night budget staple available at most locations.
Get 20 Boneless Wings in up to four flavors plus a large fry and two dipping sauces for $16.99 via Wingstop.com or the app.
Chick-fil-A's limited-time Peach Milkshake is back for summer 2026 — order via the free Chick-fil-A One app or in-store (free account helpful for ordering ahead).
